Reason_for_Visit.summary: Newly diagnosed breast cancer, left breast, stage II, triple negative, to discuss treatment options

Clinical_Findings.findings: Core biopsy: grade 3 IDC, ER/PR/HER2 negative, 3.6 x 2.8 x 2.0 cm hypoechoic mass in the left breast at the 1:00 position, 4-5 cm from the nipple, 1 cm firm node in the left axilla, axilla US: indeterminate lymph node with prominent vessel measuring up to 5 mm, CT CAP negative, MRI brain: negative, bone scan: negative

Current_Medications.current_meds: cholecalciferol, vitamin D3, 2,000 unit TAB, fluticasone (FLONASE) 50 mcg/actuation nasal spray

Treatment_Changes.supportive_meds: fluticasone (FLONASE) 50 mcg/actuation nasal spray, cholecalciferol, vitamin D3, 2,000 unit TAB

Treatment_Goals.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

Response_Assessment.response_assessment: There is no evidence of cancer response as the patient has not started treatment yet.

chemotherapy.summary: Weekly paclitaxel x 12 weeks, either with a taxane agent or replaced by a anthracycline agent, or with paclitaxel alone, followed by AC x 4 cycles, then surgery
chemotherapy.Short term side_effects_discussed: alopecia, nausea, emesis, neuropathy, rash, allergic reactions, constipation, diarrhea, fatigue
chemotherapy.Long term side_effects_discussed: low blood counts with possible increased risk of infections

radiotherapy.summary: MRI scans are obtained throughout treatment as well as one additional biopsy

other treatment.summary: Echocardiogram, Port placement, Laboratory studies for ISPY, MRI of the breasts with additional evaluations as necessary

Medication_Plan.medication_plan: Weekly paclitaxel x 12 weeks, followed by AC x 4 cycles, then surgery, with goserelin monthly during chemotherapy

Therapy_plan.therapy_plan: weekly paclitaxel x 12 weeks, either with a platinum agent or replaced by a taxane agent, or with paclitaxel alone, followed by AC x 4 cycles, then surgery
Therapy_plan.imaging_schedule: MRI scans throughout treatment as well as one additional biopsy
Therapy_plan.trial_participation: to one of the existing arms of the study

Imaging_Plan.imaging_plan: MRI of the breasts with additional evaluations as necessary

Referral.Others: Physical or occupational therapy, Social work, financial counseling, home health
Referral.follow up: MRI of the breasts with additional evaluations as necessary, Echocardiogram, Port placement, Laboratory studies for ISPY
